div.head: The Ambassador in Peru (Norweb) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 623. Supplementing my telegram no. 601, April 28, 5 p.m.Not printed. The Finance Minister has just informed me that President Prado does not consider the proposal acceptable in view of a conversation in which DugganLaurence Duggan, Adviser on Political Relations. For correspondence on the trip of Vice President Wallace and Mr. Duggan to certain American Republics including Peru, see vol. v, pp. 55 ff. is said to have promised to urge reconsideration of the article 3 matter. Since I have no other information in the above regard the Department’s comments would be appreciated.
